headline: How Investors May Respond To Prologis (PLD) €1 Billion Pan-European Logistics Venture With La Caisse
summary: Prologis and La Caisse recently announced the creation of Prologis Logistics Investment Venture Europe (PLIVE), a pan-European joint venture initially seeded with €1 billion of logistics properties, with La Caisse holding a 70% interest and Prologis acting as operating partner. This move expands Prologis’s fee-earning asset management and development role across key European logistics markets, deepening its exposure to shifting supply-chain and warehouse demand patterns across the...
